message:
fix: resolve compilation errors in actor, websocket, and kafka modules

- actor/gen_server: remove Sender::close() calls (method only exists on
  Receiver), fix cx.masked() usage, add poll_fn-based stopping logic
- websocket: replace BytesMut::chunk()/advance() with slice and split_to()
  (BytesMut only implements BufMut, not Buf), extract flush_write_buf as
  standalone function for shared use by Read and Write halves, replace
  write_all_io with AsyncWriteExt::write_all
- kafka: add missing .await on async send/flush calls in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
